channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Chairman of Sammilito Islami Bank Mohammad Ayub Mia resigns

- Sammilito Islami Bank chairman Ayub Miah resigns

- Chairman of Sammilito Islami Bank resigns citing 'personal reasons'
